External TextMate fixtures used by `tools/check_integrations.sh`.

`Bibtex.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `Clojure.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`CSS.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `Diff.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,

`Go.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`HLSL.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `HTML.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `INI.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`Ignore.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`Java.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `JavaScript.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`JavaScriptReact.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`JSON.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `JSONC.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`JSONL.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`MagicRegExp.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `Makefile.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`ObjectiveC.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `Python.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`PowerShell.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `R.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`Rust.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`SassDoc.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `SCSS.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`ShaderLab.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `Shell.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `SQL.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`Swift.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `TeX.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `TypeScript.tmLanguage.json.partNN`,
`TypeScriptReact.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, `XML.tmLanguage.json.partNN`, and
`XSL.tmLanguage.json.partNN`
reconstruct TextMate grammars from Microsoft VS Code commit
`7207f731a477434811e61ca70e6c66ee4dc393fd`:

The Swift grammar file notes that it was converted from
`jtbandes/swift-tmlanguage` commit
`3fca2fa10f7dc962d19ee617b17844d6eecfa2cb`.

The Python grammar file notes that it was converted from MagicPython. The
MagicPython MIT license text is in `LICENSE-MAGICPYTHON`.

The Go grammar file notes that it was converted from `worlpaker/go-syntax`.
The go-syntax MIT license text is in `LICENSE-GO-SYNTAX`.

The HLSL grammar file notes that it was converted from `tgjones/shaders-tmLanguage`
commit `87c0dca3a39170dbd7ee7e277db4f915fb2de14a`. The shaders-tmLanguage MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-SHADERS-TMLANGUAGE`.

The Docker grammar file notes that it was converted from Moby commit
`c2029cb2574647e4bc28ed58486b8e85883eedb9`. The Moby Apache-2.0 license text
is in `LICENSE-MOBY`.

The Batch grammar file notes that it was converted from `mmims/language-batchfile`
commit `6154ae25a24e01ac9329e7bcf958e093cd8733a9`. The language-batchfile MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-LANGUAGE-BATCHFILE`.

The Clojure grammar file notes that it was converted from `atom/language-clojure`
commit `45bdb881501d0b8f8b707ca1d3fcc8b4b99fca03`. The language-clojure MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-LANGUAGE-CLOJURE`.

The Dart grammar file notes that it was converted from `dart-lang/dart-syntax-highlight`
commit `b2e04fbe2334bfe56940106b652f4c5799affbb1`. The dart-syntax-highlight license
text is in `LICENSE-DART-SYNTAX-HIGHLIGHT`.

The ASP VB.NET grammar file notes that it was converted from `textmate/asp.vb.net.tmbundle`
commit `72d44550b3286d0382d7be0624140cf97857ff69`. The asp.vb.net.tmbundle license
text is in `LICENSE-ASP-VB-NET-TMBUNDLE`.

The Dotenv grammar file notes that it was converted from `dotenv-org/dotenv-vscode`
commit `e7e41baa5b23e01c1ff0567a4e596c24860e7def`. The dotenv-vscode MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-DOTENV-VSCODE`.

The Git Commit grammar file notes that it was converted from
`walles/git-commit-message-plus` commit
`35a079dea5a91b087021b40c01a6bb4eb0337a87`. The git-commit-message-plus license
text is in `LICENSE-GIT-COMMIT-MESSAGE-PLUS`.

The Diff grammar file notes that it was converted from `textmate/diff.tmbundle`
commit `0593bb775eab1824af97ef2172fd38822abd97d7`. The diff.tmbundle license text
is in `LICENSE-DIFF-TMBUNDLE`.

The INI grammar file notes that it was converted from `textmate/ini.tmbundle`
commit `2af0cbb0704940f967152616f2f1ff0aae6287a6`. The ini.tmbundle license text
is in `LICENSE-INI-TMBUNDLE`.

The JSON and JSONL grammar files note that they were converted from
`microsoft/vscode-JSON.tmLanguage` commit
`9bd83f1c252b375e957203f21793316203f61f70`. The vscode-JSON.tmLanguage license
text is in `LICENSE-VSCODE-JSON-TMLANGUAGE`.

The MagicRegExp grammar file notes that it was converted from MagicPython. The
MagicPython MIT license text is in `LICENSE-MAGICPYTHON`.

The JavaScriptReact and TypeScriptReact grammar files note that they were
converted from `microsoft/TypeScript-TmLanguage` commit
`48f608692aa6d6ad7bd65b478187906c798234a8`. The TypeScript-TmLanguage MIT
license text is in `LICENSE-TYPESCRIPT-TMLANGUAGE`.

The Makefile grammar file notes that it was converted from `fadeevab/make.tmbundle`
commit `1d4c0b541959995db098df751ffc129da39a294b`. The make.tmbundle license text
is in `LICENSE-MAKE-TMBUNDLE`.

The Shell grammar file notes that it was converted from `jeff-hykin/better-shell-syntax`
commit `35020b0bd79a90d3b262b4c13a8bb0b33adc1f45`. The better-shell-syntax MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-BETTER-SHELL-SYNTAX`.

The Git Rebase grammar file notes that it was converted from `textmate/git.tmbundle`
commit `5870cf3f8abad3a6637bdf69250b5d2ded427dc4`. The git.tmbundle MIT license text
is in `LICENSE-GIT-TMBUNDLE`.

The Objective-C grammar file notes that it was converted from `jeff-hykin/better-objc-syntax`
commit `119b75fb1f4d3e8726fa62588e3b935e0b719294`. The better-objc-syntax MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-BETTER-OBJC-SYNTAX`.

The PowerShell grammar file notes that it was converted from `PowerShell/EditorSyntax`
commit `742f0b5d4b60f5930c0b47fcc1f646860521296e`. The EditorSyntax MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-POWERSHELL-EDITORSYNTAX`.

The Rust grammar file notes that it was converted from `dustypomerleau/rust-syntax`
commit `268fd42cfd4aa96a6ed9024a2850d17d6cd2dc7b`. The rust-syntax MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-RUST-SYNTAX`.

The ShaderLab grammar file notes that it was converted from `tgjones/shaders-tmLanguage`
commit `c72c8b39380ba5a86c58ceed053b5d965ebf38b3`. The shaders-tmLanguage MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-SHADERS-TMLANGUAGE`.

The R grammar file notes that it was converted from `REditorSupport/vscode-R-syntax`
commit `b199996070723eefbe7a61e0384b2ae4768eb7f0`. The vscode-R-syntax MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-VSCODE-R-SYNTAX`.

The SQL grammar file notes that it was converted from `microsoft/vscode-mssql`
commit `c002f514dd81fa71fa304d4c36f8d2767dbf2f9d`. The vscode-mssql MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-VSCODE-MSSQL`.

The BibTeX and TeX grammar files note that they were converted from
`jlelong/vscode-latex-basics` commits
`0fcf9283828cab2aa611072f54feb1e7d501c2b4` and
`76dc409348227db00f6779772f7763dc90cdf22e`. The vscode-latex-basics MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-VSCODE-LATEX-BASICS`.

The XSL grammar file notes that it was converted from `atom/language-xml`
commit `507de2ee7daca60cf02e9e21fbeb92bbae73e280`. The language-xml MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-LANGUAGE-XML`.

The SCSS and SassDoc grammar files note that they were converted from
`atom/language-sass` commits `f52ab12f7f9346cc2568129d8c4419bd3d506b47` and
`303bbf0c250fe380b9e57375598cfd916110758b`. The language-sass MIT license
text is in `LICENSE-LANGUAGE-SASS`.

The Git Commit grammar includes `source.diff`, Git Rebase includes `source.shell`,
ShaderLab includes `source.hlsl`, TeX includes `source.r`,
XSL includes `text.xml`, XML includes `source.java`, SCSS includes `source.sassdoc`
and `source.css`, SassDoc includes `source.css.scss` and `source.js`, and
the HTML grammar includes `source.css`, `source.js`, and `text.html.basic`, so this fixture set exercises
external TextMate dependency graph resolution in addition to standalone roots.

Microsoft VS Code is MIT licensed; the copied license text is in
`LICENSE-MICROSOFT`.
